top_threats.product: EXPANDED RECALL — all Clover Hill Dairy brand cheese (hard and soft). Includes: Soft Cuajada in Brine (5-gal bucket 30-lb, 2-gal bucket 14-lb); Soft Cuajada vacuum sealed (5-lb bags, 2.5-lb clamshell, 0.90-lb / 14-oz clamshell); Cuajada vacuum sealed (30-lb boxes); Ricotta (5-gal bucket 40-lb, 2-gal bucket 18-lb, 2.5-lb tubs, 1-lb clamshell); Soft Cuajada Crumbs; Mild Cheese Varieties — Yummy Cheddar, White Cheddar, White Colby, Monterey Jack, Marble Jack (½-lb, 1-lb, 2.5-lb, 5-lb, 40-lb); Sharp Cheese Varieties — Cheddar, Yummy Cheddar, White Cheddar, Monterey Jack; Flavored — Horseradish, Old Bay Cheddar; Pepper Jack Varieties — Jalapeño Cheddar, Pepper Jack, Sizzlin Colby with Habanero Peppers; Smoked Cheddar (Cheddar, White Cheddar); Smoked Pepper — Jalapeño Cheddar; plus Fresh Cheddar Curd and assorted Snack Pack / 3-in-a-Pack stix formats.
